home.description: Find your dream car or sell your vehicle with ease.

page.title: This is the Admin Page
page.description: Full platform oversight — manage listings, users, and system settings.

notice.title: Admin area
notice.body: You have access to sensitive platform data. All actions are logged and audited.

quick.listingsDesc: Review, approve, or remove car listings submitted by users.
quick.usersDesc: View user profiles, roles, and account status.
quick.analyticsDesc: Platform-wide traffic, conversions, and revenue metrics.

page.title: This is the Dealer Page
page.description: Manage your inventory, track leads, and grow your dealership on autod.pro.

actions.inventoryDesc: Browse and manage your full vehicle stock.
actions.leadsDesc: Track buyer enquiries and follow-up conversations.
actions.reportsDesc: View performance stats for your listings.

info.title: Dealer portal
info.body: This is the dealer page. You can manage your listings, respond to leads, and view analytics for your showroom.
